## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore

## Branch Flow Confirmation

- [ ] This PR targets dev (feature/fix work)
- [ ] This PR is dev -> main (release only)

## Validation

- [ ] Frontend build passes (`cd frontend && npm run build`)
- [ ] Backend validation passes (`python -m compileall backend/app`)
- [ ] Backend tests pass (or none collected)

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, keys, or .env files were committed
- [ ] New environment variables are documented in .env.example
- [ ] Dependency/security checks were reviewed

## Notes For Reviewers

Add context, risks, or rollout notes.
